criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average rating given by users on various app stores and platforms.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Trustpilot

criteria.name: Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of times the app has been downloaded.
criteria.sources: App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: Content Library Size
criteria.description: Size and variety of the content library offered by the app.

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration for personalization, recommendations, and user experience.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, tech blogs

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: Ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's user interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, tech reviews, UX design analyses

criteria.name: Subscription Cost
criteria.description: Cost of subscription plans offered by the app.

criteria.name: Multi-Platform Support
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms and devices.

criteria.name: Social Features
criteria.description: Integration of social features such as sharing, commenting, and community building.
